title: Citrus Prawn Fajita
description: A flavorful and zesty Mexican appetizer featuring succulent prawns, marinated in a citrus blend.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of avocado oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper, cooking for 3-4 minutes until tender.
Add the cumin, chili powder, salt, and black pepper to the skillet, stirring to combine.
Add the prawns to the skillet, cooking for 2-3 minutes per side until pink and cooked through.
Stir in the lime and orange juice, cooking for an additional minute.
Serve the prawns with the bell pepper and onion mixture, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
For added flavor, serve with warm flour or corn tortillas on the side.
